user_request: Find inspiration references for a countertop grinder with playful CMF, soft volumes, and premium kitchen-counter presence. Return 3 strong references.

evaluation.design_direction_summary: Premium countertop grinder with soft cylindrical volumes, a sculptural silhouette, and playful wood-metal CMF that feels warm, modern, and appliance-ready.
strengths: Strong countertop presence with a tall, elegant vertical profile
Soft, rounded body volumes feel approachable and premium
Excellent CMF contrast between matte body, warm wood, and metallic accents
Distinctive grinder handle/detail adds a playful sculptural element
Refined colorways that work well in a high-end kitchen context
Clean, minimal surfacing with good visual hierarchy
weaknesses: A bit product-render generic in execution despite strong form
Some proportions feel long and slender rather than compact and countertop-friendly
Playfulness is restrained; may be slightly too serious for the brief if looking for more whimsy
Reference is primarily a single product family, so variety across the set is limited
